short_effect: May cause bad poisoning when the Pokémon hits an opponent with a move.

name: embody-aspect
short_effect: Embody Aspect boosts a particular stat, depending on the form of a Terastallized Ogerpon

name: tera-shift
short_effect: When Terapagos enters the battle, it turns into its Terastal Form until the end of the battle.

name: tera-shell
short_effect: All damage-dealing moves that hit the Pokémon when its HP is full will not be very effective.

name: teraform-zero
short_effect: As soon as Terapagos assumes its Stellar Form, it will immediately neutralize weather and terrain effects.

name: poison-puppeteer
short_effect: Pokémon poisoned by Pecharunt's moves will also become confused.
